summary: PR 2747 matched the `main/melee/gr/ground` `.data` section by reshaping `src/melee/gr/ground.c` data definitions into typed HSD light/fog-related structures, removing several string/data helper globals, adding local address comments, and renaming a symbols.txt data object at 0x803E070C to `unused_ints`. Bot report says ground `.data` improved from 89.72% to 100.00% with +225 matched bytes.

key_files.role: Main source change; retyped ground data objects, adjusted asserts and local names, added default switch returns, and introduced `unused_ints` data.
Symbol metadata update for the newly named local int data object at .data:0x803E070C.

what_changed.text: Renamed `.data:0x803E070C` from `lbl_803E070C` to `unused_ints` in `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` with `scope:local data:int`, and added `static int unused_ints[] = { 1, 1, 0, 0, 0, 180, 0, 0, 0 };` in `ground.c`.

Converted loosely typed arrays and ad-hoc structs around `Ground_803E065C`, `Ground_803E066C`, `Ground_803E0680`, `Ground_803E069C`, `Ground_803E06AC`, and `Ground_803E06C8` into `HSD_LightAnim`, `HSD_WObjDesc`, `HSD_LightDesc`, `LightList`, and `HSD_LightAnim*` definitions.

Moved several light-list helper objects into typed static declarations near their users, including `Ground_804D4500`, `Ground_804D450C`, `Ground_804D4514`, and `Ground_804D451C`, and removed earlier `struct Node`/`SDATA UNK_T` definitions.

Removed local string globals used only for assert messages (`Ground_804D44F8`, `lightset`, `plightset`, `Ground_804D4524`, `Ground_804D452C`) and replaced several generated assert forms with `HSD_ASSERT` or a temporary `FOG_ASSERT` macro.
Renamed the second parameter of `Ground_801C20E0` from `lights` to `lightset` and updated uses accordingly.
Added explicit `default: return;` cases to two stage dispatch switches.
Added address comments to `stage_info`, `Ground_803DFEA8`, and several static data definitions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: StageInfo stage_info and StageData Ground_803DFEA8

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded one new `.data` match for `main/melee/gr/ground`, moving the unit `.data` from 89.72% to 100.00% and total matched data by +2184 bytes.

smart_moves.text: The PR improved data ownership/readability by replacing anonymous float/UNK_T layouts with existing HSD types where the layout fit (`HSD_LightAnim`, `HSD_WObjDesc`, `HSD_LightDesc`, `LightList`).
It avoided keeping ordinary assert-message strings as standalone data objects when the assert could be expressed as `HSD_ASSERT` without a custom message.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Ground_804D44F8/lightset/plightset removal and HSD_ASSERT replacements

smart_moves.text: The data symbol rename in `symbols.txt` was paired with a source definition, keeping symbol metadata and source data in sync.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For data-matching work, check whether anonymous float arrays, `UNK_T` arrays, or one-off local structs are actually SDK/HSD data structures before preserving generated shapes.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: conversion of Ground_803E065C/Ground_803E066C/Ground_803E0680/Ground_803E06AC/Ground_803E06C8 to HSD typed data

decomp_lessons.lesson: String globals introduced only to support generated assert-message forms may be removable when the source-level form is a plain `HSD_ASSERT` with the correct line and condition.
When matching data, source-side static definitions and `config/GALE01/symbols.txt` symbol metadata may need to change together so the named object, scope, type, and address agree.

naming_conventions.name: unused_ints
naming_conventions.observation: A previously address-style local data object at `.data:0x803E070C` was given a descriptive-but-conservative name matching its apparent contents as an int array.

naming_conventions.name: lightset
naming_conventions.observation: `Ground_801C20E0` parameter `lights` was renamed to `lightset`, matching the assert condition and light-list role used throughout the function.

naming_conventions.name: address comments
naming_conventions.observation: Several ground globals/statics gained address comments such as `/* 49E6C8 */`, `/* 3DFEA8 */`, and `/* 3E065C */`, apparently to document data-section placement while keeping source definitions typed.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: address comments on stage_info, Ground_803DFEA8, and typed data objects

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Retype data objects to existing SDK/HSD structs rather than matching as raw float arrays or `UNK_T` blobs.
Remove data-only assert strings when plain `HSD_ASSERT` preserves the file/line/condition behavior needed by code and data matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: assert_line and assert-message string removals
result_evidence: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report matched data +0.18%, +2184 bytes

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use a temporary local macro to model header-originated fog asserts with `__assert("fog.h", line, #cond)` while leaving a TODO to replace it with real fog.h inlines.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: `/// @todo replace with fog.h inlines` and `FOG_ASSERT` macro
result_evidence: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report reports successful data match, but no separate objdiff/build detail for this tactic

evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: two changed files and line counts
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for both changed files
notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice, so intent and reviewer rationale are not evidenced.
The bot report supports a data-match result for `main/melee/gr/ground`, but the slice does not include full build logs, objdiff details, or per-symbol data validation.
The diff includes a TODO for fog.h inlines and a temporary `FOG_ASSERT` macro; this should not be promoted as a preferred global style.
The PR was merged according to metadata, but merge alone is not treated as proof of a generalized standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use real HSD data structs for ground light data when layout supports it
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2747, `ground.c` data matching improved by replacing anonymous float/UNK_T/light-list blobs with typed `HSD_LightAnim`, `HSD_WObjDesc`, `HSD_LightDesc`, and `LightList` definitions. Candidate lesson: for stage/ground light data, test existing HSD light/fog/resource structs before keeping raw generated data shapes.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Assert cleanup can reduce false data ownership
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2747 removed several standalone assert-message strings and replaced generated assert forms with `HSD_ASSERT` where conditions and line numbers were plain. Candidate lesson: before accepting string globals as data, check whether they are artifacts of expanded assert/report code.

source_update_candidates.title: ground.c contains stage/ground light-list data matched with HSD light types
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2747 changed `src/melee/gr/ground.c` data definitions around `Ground_803E065C` through `Ground_803E06C8` from raw arrays/ad-hoc structs to `HSD_LightAnim`, `HSD_WObjDesc`, `HSD_LightDesc`, and `LightList`, contributing to a 100% `.data` match for `main/melee/gr/ground` according to the bot report.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-scoped hint for future work in ground light/fog data; requires curator review before adding as a path fact.

source_update_candidates.title: Temporary fog assert macro remains in ground.c pending fog.h inline recovery
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2747 added `FOG_ASSERT(line, cond)` in `src/melee/gr/ground.c` with the TODO `replace with fog.h inlines`, modeling `__assert("fog.h", line, #cond)` around `fog->start` and `fog->end` assignments in `Ground_801C4FAC`.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful follow-up marker for header-inline cleanup; should not be promoted as accepted style.

source_update_candidates.title: Data matching should check typed SDK structs before raw generated data
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2747 is evidence that matching data can improve when raw arrays/ad-hoc structs are replaced by real SDK/HSD structs. This aligns with typed-access standards, but any global-standard wording should be curated carefully because the slice only covers one ground data PR.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible enhancement/example for existing typed-fields or data-ownership standards; evidence is local, not broad enough to auto-promote.

rejection_notes: Do not treat the temporary `FOG_ASSERT` macro as a recommended style; the diff itself labels it a TODO to replace with fog.h inlines.
Do not infer that all address-style ground data names should be renamed; this PR only evidences the specific `unused_ints` rename and typed light-data objects.
Do not infer reviewer approval rationale because the loaded slice contains no review comments.
Do not claim complete code-match validation beyond the bot-reported `.data` match for `main/melee/gr/ground`.
